metadata.method_name: Two-Track CCRG K-track (anchored greedy set-cover) — non-spelling absorption selection-isolation (iter-3 re-analysis: RE-k controls + AUC-difference CIs + router inputs)

stats.auc_diff_ci: stratified paired bootstrap (resample positives & negatives separately)

honest_notes: LEAD hierarchy (M7): Georgia is diagnostic-corroborated; KG mean top1=0.3181818181818182.
Jordan n=124 (<150 -> DESCRIPTIVE/underpowered) but KG top1=0.9545454545454546 (form-free corroborated).
Georgia AUC(unit)-AUC(h) diff=0.6060095238095238 CI=[0.5698221428571428,0.6419030555555556]: if CI includes 0 the matched-recall Georgia win is an operating-point effect, not an AUC-rank effect (R1).
United States: g/h already cover it and unit collapses at matched tau -> NOT a selection win.
RE-k-anchored is the honest selection control (holds the high-recall anchor fixed, asks whether the set-cover choice of absorbers beats random eligible absorbers).
SUGGESTIVE / diagnostic-UNCONFIRMED (M7): integer beats g/h on matched recall BUT KG mean top1=0.0 (0.0) and the dense probe AUC dominates -> NOT promoted.
RE-k-anchored is the honest selection control (holds the high-recall anchor fixed, asks whether the set-cover choice of absorbers beats random eligible absorbers).
